{{Quote|Ah. One cannot get service like this in the Inner Rim…or even in the Colonies.|[[Schurk-Heren]]|<ref name="Dark Times 5">[[Dark Times 5|''Dark Times'' 5]]</ref>}}
'''Calamar''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]]. The [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] pleasant climate and rich history conspired to make Calamar a center of high culture, and its suburbs were dominated by vast parks, art centers, holo-production companies, and places of higher learning such as the [[Darpa Center of History at Calamar]]. The [[Hall of Esseles]] was the government headquarters, located within the city.

A large cell of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] was based out of the entertainment district.
